name: CVM-3A "Themis"
description: The Themis scales cryovolatile extraction to industrial throughput using a pulsed Nd:YAG laser array operating at 1064 nm. High-peak-power pulses of 20 ns duration ablate and sublimate volatiles from a 4 m² working face simultaneously; each pulse cycle liberates a depth of approximately 0.3 mm of ice. A wide-aperture gas capture shroud and 3-stage cryogenic compression train condense the product stream into dense liquid or slush form for storage. The system handles mixed-volatile ices (water, CO₂, methane, ammonia, nitrogen) without retuning. Named for the Titaness of divine law and order.
